text: A motorcyclist safety program is hereby established in the Department of the California Highway Patrol, to be administered by the commissioner.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 2. ADMINISTRATION [1500 - 3093]
### Chapter 5. California Traffic Safety Program [2900 - 2935]
#### Article 2. Motorcycle Safety [2930 - 2935]
##### § 2931

A motorcyclist safety program is hereby established in the Department of the California Highway Patrol, to be administered by the commissioner.

*(Added by Stats. 1985, Ch. 547, Sec. 2.)*

subsections.text: A motorcyclist safety program is hereby established in the Department of the California Highway Patrol, to be administered by the commissioner.
